summary: Completed testing of X-CLEAN Phase 1 features: Budapest location, location selector, extras CRUD. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: Fixed Pencil import bug in Services.jsx. All features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/services/locations returns Debrecen and Budapest
Backend: GET /api/services/extras without location returns all extras
Backend: GET /api/services/extras?location=Debrecen returns Debrecen + universal extras
Backend: GET /api/services/extras?location=Budapest returns Budapest + universal extras
Backend: GET /api/services/pricing-data returns all data
Backend: GET /api/services/pricing-data?location=Debrecen returns filtered extras
Backend: GET /api/services/pricing-data?location=Budapest returns filtered extras
Backend: POST /api/services/extras creates Debrecen extra (admin auth)
Backend: POST /api/services/extras creates Budapest extra (admin auth)
Backend: POST /api/services/extras creates universal extra (admin auth)
Backend: PUT /api/services/extras/{id} updates extra
Backend: DELETE /api/services/extras/{id} deletes extra
Backend: POST /api/services/extras requires admin authentication
Backend: GET /api/services/extras/admin returns all extras for admin
Backend: GET /api/services/extras/admin?location=Debrecen returns filtered extras
Frontend: BookingPage shows Debrecen and Budapest location selector buttons
Frontend: Admin header shows location selector dropdown (Összes telephely / Debrecen / Budapest)
Frontend: Services page has 'Extrák' tab with CRUD functionality
Frontend: Extrák tab shows extras with location badges (Debrecen, Budapest, or none for universal)
Frontend: New extra dialog has location selector (Mindenhol / Debrecen / Budapest)
Frontend: Dashboard shows location badge from header context
Frontend: DayManagement shows location from context (Debrecen badge visible)
seed_data_creation: Test extras created during pytest run (TEST_* prefixed) are cleaned up automatically. Existing test extras: Bőrápolás (Debrecen), Kerámia bevonat (Budapest), Ózongenerátor (universal).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 tested Phase 1 features: Budapest location addition, location selector in admin header, extras CRUD with location assignment. Fixed missing Pencil import in Services.jsx. All backend endpoints working: /api/services/locations, /api/services/extras (with location filter), /api/services/pricing-data (with location filter), extras CRUD (POST/PUT/DELETE). Frontend verified: BookingPage has Debrecen/Budapest selector, admin header has location dropdown, Services page has Extrák tab with full CRUD, Dashboard and DayManagement use LocationContext from App.js.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS notifications via Twilio are mocked

features_verified.1_backend_locations: GET /api/services/locations returns Debrecen and Budapest - VERIFIED
features_verified.4_backend_extras_create: POST /api/services/extras creates new extra (admin only) - VERIFIED
features_verified.8_frontend_header_selector: Admin header shows location selector dropdown - VERIFIED
features_verified.10_frontend_services_extras: Services page has Extrák tab with CRUD - VERIFIED
features_verified.11_frontend_dashboard_context: Dashboard shows location from header context - VERIFIED
features_verified.12_frontend_daymanagement_context: DayManagement shows location from context - VERIFIED
